HGSS.498.0000: Let me recount a terrifying tale...\f
HGSS.498.0001:
Then again, it’s not as scary while
it’s still light outside.\f
Come back after sunset, OK?
HGSS.498.0002:
Once upon a time, there was a little
boy who was given a new Bicycle...\r
He wanted to try it right away...\f
He was having so much fun that he
didn’t notice that it was\r
already dark...\f
While riding home in the pitch-black
night, the Bike suddenly slowed!\f
The pedals became heavy!\f
The Bike began slipping
backward as if it was dragged\r
by someone!\f
It was as if the Bike were cursed and
trying to drag him into oblivion!\f
...\f
...\f
Shrieeeek!\f
The boy had been riding uphill on
Cycling Road!\f
...
Ba-dum, ba-dum!\f
For listening so patiently, you may
take this item--Spell Tag!\f
HGSS.498.0003:
Spell Tag boosts the power of
Ghost-type moves.\f
It won’t slow your Bicycle, so
don’t worry!
